heading: Exportation of uranium depleted in the isotope 235
label: 2778a Exportation of uranium depleted in the isotope 235
text: Upon a finding that an export of uranium depleted in the isotope 235 is incorporated in defense articles or commodities solely to take advantage of high density or pyrophoric characteristics unrelated to its radioactivity, such exports shall be exempt from the provisions of the Atomic Energy Act of 1954 [ et seq.] and of the Nuclear Non-Proliferation Act of 1978 [ et seq.] when such exports are subject to the controls established under the Arms Export Control Act [ et seq.] or the Export Administration Act of 1979.42 U.S.C. 201122 U.S.C. 320122 U.S.C. 2751

CodificationSection was enacted as part of the International Security and Development Cooperation Act of 1980, and not as part of the Arms Export Control Act which comprises this chapter.
